description:
A DJ software that enables a comfortable DJ workflow with AI, cloud, and automation tech. Supporting multiple music streaming services.

rekordbox is composite software that manages music files and DJ performances. With this music management software, you can manage music files in computers and mobile devices (this includes analysis, changing settings, creating files, and saving playback histories). It allows you to produce great DJ performances by combining music files managed by rekordbox and DJ equipment.
NEW
- CDJ-1500X compatibility added.
- XDJ-AN compatibility added.
- Support for CoBeat.
  You can create Request Catalog. See here for details.
- Support for Phase in HID mode.
  Once you connect Phase, you can now select WIRELESS in DVS mode.
- Added the following functions when using Spotify
Adding Spotify tracks to rekordbox [Collection]
Support for Automix with Spotify tracks
Added [Your Library] and [Made to DJ] (which displays curated playlists) to Spotify
Added the following features to Spotify's [Your Library]:
Playlist search
Playlist sort
Pin/unpin
Add tracks to [Liked Songs]
- Added an option to [Sort Hot Cues by time].
- Added an option to [Hide Title, Artist, and Artwork] for [Deck track information display].
CHANGED
- AI detection of vocal position is now available on all subscription plans.
- Following the integration of Beatsource to Beatport, we've removed all Beatsource-related functions.
  Please use Beatport going forward. See here for details.
FIXED
- Potential crash when logging into Spotify.
- Unable to load some SoundCloud tracks to the Deck.
- Improved stability and fixes for other minor issues.
